en: I'm not your kid.
You said you were going to Chicago.
My daughter can't see me this weekend.
ko: 내 딸은 이번 주말에 나를 못 봐.

en: She's going skiing.
You said she was four years old.
You're lying.
She was four when I left.
ko: 내가 떠날 때 그녀는 네 살이었어.

en: Now she's 15.
My wife's been remarried for 11 years.
I see Grace every now and again.
I don't understand.
Sure you do.
Sometimes it's easier living the lie.
ko: 때때로 거짓말을 사는 게 더 쉬워.

en: I'm going to let you fly tonight, Frank.
ko: 오늘 밤 너를 자유롭게 해줄게, 프랭크.

en: I'm not even going to try to stop you.
ko: 나는 너를 막으려고 하지도 않을 거야.

en: Because I know you'll be back on Monday.
ko: 왜냐하면 너 월요일에 돌아올 거라는 걸 알거든.

en: Yeah.
How do you know I'll come back?
ko: 어떻게 내가 돌아온다는 걸 아는 거야?

en: Look.
Frank.
Nobody's chasing you.
American Airlines 9131 to Pittsburgh is now ready for boarding.
ko: 미국 항공 9131편, 피츠버그행 탑승 준비 완료.

en: After your boarding passes, please proceed to Gate 23A.
